what_it_does: Defines, inside an IIFE, a window.usePersisted(key, initial) React hook that mirrors useState to localStorage under a 'cvstudio:' namespace (lazy init reads stored JSON or the initial value/function; an effect writes the value on change), plus a window.cvStudioStorage utility with getAll() and clear() over all namespaced keys.
observations: Namespace constant NS = 'cvstudio:'; an `all()` helper lists localStorage keys starting with NS.
usePersisted supports a function-form initial (typeof initial === 'function' ? initial() : initial) in both the no-value and parse-error branches.
Lazy initializer reads and JSON.parses the stored value; try/catch falls back to initial on any error.
useEffect writes JSON.stringify(val) on [fullKey, val] change, wrapped in try/catch (silent).
cvStudioStorage.getAll() returns a {shortKey: parsedValue} map (null on parse failure); clear() removes every namespaced key.
Uses React.useState/React.useEffect from the global React, no imports.
Entire module is an IIFE attaching to window.
standouts: The shared 'cvstudio:' namespace plus getAll/clear gives a single place to export or wipe all persisted studio state.
conventions: Window-global registration and global-React usage consistent with the app.
Namespacing matches Resizable.jsx's 'cvstudio:resizable:' prefix (same NS root).
Mirrors the standard useState-to-localStorage hook pattern.
concerns: Writes are silent try/catch; a quota or serialization failure is swallowed with no signal.
No cross-tab sync (no storage-event listener), so two tabs can diverge.
notes: The studio's localStorage-backed useState plus a namespaced export/clear utility; everything persists under 'cvstudio:' so it can be dumped or wiped at once.
questions: Is cross-tab synchronization out of scope for this hook?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches: header comment 'small localStorage state hook ... namespaced so we can clear/export everything at once' is exactly what getAll/clear and the namespace provide.
intention_signals: Aims to make persistence a one-liner across the studio while keeping all persisted state under one namespace so it can be inspected, exported, or reset as a unit.
novelty: Pairs the common persisted-state hook with a deliberate namespace-wide export/clear API, treating all studio state as one collection.
contribution: Contributes a namespaced localStorage useState hook plus a getAll/clear collection utility that a fused system would keep as its persistence primitive and state export/reset point.
summary_for_embedding: IIFE defining window.usePersisted, a localStorage-backed React useState hook under a 'cvstudio:' namespace, plus window.cvStudioStorage getAll/clear over all namespaced keys.
intention_for_embedding: To make studio state persist with one hook while keeping all of it under one namespace for export or wipe.
